hilton meyer

HomeArticles

Checklists I find useful to make sure everything is either in the car or what I should check to get something up and running without worrying if I missed a step. I find checklists really useful as it gets rid of the congnitive issues of wondering what needs to be done. I also find I don't forget things that way. If I rememeber correctly this came from how pilots have a checklist of each and every check they do before take-off, so if it works for them I reckon it should help a plonker like me.

Bucket List

List of things I really dream to get done

List of targets to do in the home to become more self sufficient

Kids Activities

List of things to do with the Kids

List of camping gear

List of camping gear for a overnight or lighter trip
